metadata.name: Cognitive Services Project Capability Host
metadata.description:
This module creates a capability host in a Cognitive Services project.
Project-level capability hosts configure per-project storage backends for threads, vectors, and files,
allowing different projects to use different storage connections.
See: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.cognitiveservices/accounts/projects/capabilityhosts
Required. Name of the capability host to create.
Optional. Array of AI services connection names. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for thread storage. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for vector stores. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
Optional. Array of connection names for file storage. These must match connection names defined in the account or project connections.
The type for a project-level capability host configuration.
The name of the project capability host.
The resource ID of the project capability host.
The output type for a project-level capability host.
Required. Name of the capability host to create.
Required. The name of the parent Cognitive Services account.
Required. The name of the parent Foundry Project.
Optional. Array of AI services connection resource IDs. These connections reference AI services available to the project.
Optional. Array of connection resource IDs for thread storage. These connections store conversation thread data for agents.
Optional. Array of connection resource IDs for vector stores. These connections store vector embeddings for semantic search.
Optional. Array of connection resource IDs for file storage. These connections store files uploaded to agents.
The resource ID of the project capability host.
The name of the project capability host.
The name of the resource group the project capability host was created in.
